title: Wormhole Artifact
description: The Wormhole Artifact is a useful item that allows you to teleport without commands to your friends through a simple UI. Inspired by the Wormhole Potion from Terraria.
body:
![Wormhole Artifact Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/404dd7384ed4ad07374b53abb3fe798ba20deb00.png)

### 🌀 **Now you can teleport to your friends!**

Introducing the Wormhole Artifact, an useful item that allows you to teleport to your friends through a simple UI, perfect for multiplayer survival, it offers a fair and balanced alternative to traditional teleportation with commands, keeping the game immersive and challenging.
# 
### ✨ **Main Features**

- The Wormhole Artifact allows you to teleport to friends, but only within the same dimension.
- It can be upgraded to the Wormhole Remote, which lets you teleport to players even if they are in a different dimension.
- The UI displays, in real time, information about all players who have a Wormhole Artifact or Wormhole Remote in their inventory:

  - Their name and head icon.
  - Their current dimension (including the five modded dimensions shown in the images; otherwise, it will display "???").
  - Their block distance from you (only if you are in the same dimension).
#
### ⚙️ **Configurable Settings**

You can customize various aspects of the mod in the wormhole-artifact-config.toml file, including:

- Durability of both the Wormhole Artifact and Wormhole Remote.
- Cooldown time for using either item.
- Ender Nacre drop rate from Ender Pearls.
#
### 📕 **Recipes**

![WormHole Artifact Recipes ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca85f50a2cac027ded1ebc459c50e6e2ebda68d9.png)
#
### 💬 **Permissions**

✔️ **Allowed**

- You may include this mod in CurseForge and Modrinth modpacks.
- You are free to use this mod in your videos (credits and a link to the mod page in the description would be appreciated).

❌ **Not Allowed**

- Reuploading this mod to any other websites, launchers, or apps.
- Using any content from this mod (textures, models, recipes, tags, etc.) in other projects.
- Selling this mod in any way or including it in paid modpacks.
#
### 🖼️ **Explanation Renders (and a gif)**

📌 **You can teleport to your friends from your same dimension with the Womrhole Artifact!**

![WormHole Artifact UI Render 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd1763746bb5c39d27f717a4bce1682c8421baf8_0.webp)

📌 **Also you can teleport to friends from other dimensions with the Wormhole Remote!**
![WormHole Artifact UI Render 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/841b85a64ff9827c71e5e5d1b95e606a20a2cd94_0.webp)

📌 **The UI can display the names of modded dimensions!**
![WormHole Artifact UI Render 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b68cde6e2bb8e480a1df05876b6296f45cee4e9d_0.webp)

📌 **Also you can get Ender Nacre from using Ender Pearls!**
![WormHole Artifact Ender Nacre Drop Gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2086d09836d3407da500658d6eef0c1152dd2a3f.gif)
